mapper.select: SELECT ISNULL(MAX(TRY_CONVERT(INT, SUBSTRING(EMP_CODE, 4, 3))), 0) FROM HRIMASTER01 WHERE COMPANY = #{company} AND EMP_CODE LIKE 'EMP[0-9][0-9][0-9]' AND LEN(EMP_CODE) = 6
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HRIMASTER01 ( COMPANY, EMP_CODE, EMP_NAME, PASSWORD_HASH, DEPT_CODE, POSITION_CODE, DUTY_CODE, ROLE_CODE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{company}, #{empCode}, #{empName}, #{password}, NULLIF(#{deptCode}, ''), NULLIF(#{positionCode}, ''), NULLIF(#{dutyCode}, ''), #{roleCode}, COALESCE(NULLIF(#{hireDate}, ''), GETDATE()), GETDATE() )
mapper.select: SELECT COMPANY AS company, EMP_CODE AS empCode, EMP_NAME AS empName, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), CREATED_AT, 23) AS hireDate, DEPT_CODE AS deptCode, POSITION_CODE AS positionCode, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), POSITION_DATE, 23) AS positionDate, DUTY_CODE AS dutyCode, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), DUTY_DATE, 23) AS dutyDate, ROLE_CODE AS roleCode FROM HRIMASTER01 WHERE COMPANY = #{company} AND EMP_CODE = #{empCode}
mapper.update: UPDATE HRIMASTER01 SET EMP_NAME = #{empName}, PASSWORD_HASH = CASE WHEN #{password} IS NULL OR #{password} = '' THEN PASSWORD_HASH ELSE #{password} END, DEPT_CODE = NULLIF(#{deptCode}, ''), POSITION_CODE = NULLIF(#{positionCode}, ''), POSITION_DATE = NULLIF(#{positionDate}, ''), DUTY_CODE = NULLIF(#{dutyCode}, ''), DUTY_DATE = NULLIF(#{dutyDate}, ''), ROLE_CODE = #{roleCode}, UPDATED_AT = GETDATE() WHERE COMPANY = #{company} AND EMP_CODE = #{empCode}
mapper.select: SELECT h.EMP_CODE AS empCode, h.EMP_NAME AS empName, d.DEPT_NAME AS deptName, p.POSITION_NAME AS positionName, du.DUTY_NAME AS dutyName, h.ROLE_CODE AS roleCode, r.ROLE_NAME AS roleName, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), h.CREATED_AT, 23) AS hireDate, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), h.RETIRE_DATE, 23) AS retireDate FROM HRIMASTER01 h LEFT JOIN ORGDEPTMASTER01 d ON d.COMPANY = h.COMPANY AND d.DEPT_CODE = h.DEPT_CODE LEFT JOIN HRTGRADEINFO01 p ON p.COMPANY = h.COMPANY AND p.POSITION_CODE = h.POSITION_CODE LEFT JOIN HRTDUTYINFO01 du ON du.COMPANY = h.COMPANY AND du.DUTY_CODE = h.DUTY_CODE LEFT JOIN SYS_ROLE01 r ON r.COMPANY = h.COMPANY AND r.ROLE_CODE = h.ROLE_CODE WHERE h.COMPANY = #{company} ORDER BY h.EMP_CODE
SELECT POSITION_CODE AS positionCode, POSITION_NAME AS positionName FROM HRTGRADEINFO01 WHERE COMPANY = #{company} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY POSITION_CODE
SELECT DUTY_CODE AS dutyCode, DUTY_NAME AS dutyName FROM HRTDUTYINFO01 WHERE COMPANY = #{company} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY DUTY_CODE

SELECT ROLE_CODE AS roleCode, ROLE_NAME AS roleName FROM SYS_ROLE01 WHERE COMPANY = #{company} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY CASE ROLE_CODE WHEN 'ADMIN' THEN 1 WHEN 'TEAM_LEADER' THEN 2 WHEN 'User' THEN 3 WHEN 'USER' THEN 3 ELSE 9 END, ROLE_CODE
